# volcenginecc_tls_host (Resource)

Host in the log service, used to manage server nodes for log collection

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_tls_host" "TLSHostDemo" {
  host_group_id = "cef95463-1bc0-410f-9c4b-3114xxxxxx"
  ip            = "192.168.1.3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_group_id` (String) Machine group ID to which the host belongs
- `ip` (String) Host IP address

### Read-Only

- `heartbeat_status` (Number) Agent heartbeat status. 0: Heartbeat normal 1: Heartbeat abnormal
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `log_collector_version` (String) Log collector version

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_tls_host.example "host_group_id|ip"
```
